5.1  Limitations
Our study utilizes RF signals collected from Orbit testbed
is collected in an controlled environment. In the real world
receivers, which would create complex multi-channel effect
would deal with much more noisy signals. We plan to evalua
channel effects in the future.
5.2  Broader Impacts
Sensitive information is constantly shared via wireless netw
important these days. As our study indicates that SNNs c
an effective defense against adversarial attacks, we believ
encouraged as a result.
